features: GIFT BAGS - Perfect for all occasions & easy to style. These versatile gift bags are ideal for birthday gifts, party bags, or general gift wrapping. Pair with tissue paper, gift wrap, or gift boxes for a stylish and stress-free presentation.
DESIGN - Add a magical finishing touch to those birthday or special presents with this large Disney Princess gift bag. It features favourites such as Rapunzel, Cinderella, Ariel and Moana.

GIFTS FOR WOMEN – Make her smile with thoughtful gift decorations. From bottle bags to wrapping paper, our range adds a special touch to any occasion and shows how much you care—before the gift is even opened.
SIZE - This gift bag measures 26.7 x 33 x 13.7 cm, no wrapping paper required! Simply place your gift inside, and the handles make it easy to carry.

HIGH QUALITY & SUSTAINABLE - Our products are crafted from high-quality material, ensuring durability and a premium feel. We use materials from responsibly managed forests and controlled sources, certified by the Forest Stewardship Council (FSC).
